name: 14oz Matte Ceramic Candle Lavender & Eucalyptus Lavender - Project 62™: Modern Jar, Dual Wick, 30hr Burn Time
description:
Enjoy moments of pure bliss with the 14oz Matte Ceramic Candle Lavender & Eucalyptus from Project 62™. Molded into a ceramic body, this candle burns for up to 30 hours, acting as the perfect stress buster. Infused with soothing notes of lavender and eucalyptus, this matte ceramic scented candle by Project 62™ makes a great pick for when you want to relax on a nice, quiet evening.

Modern pieces made for everyday living.
